programs.programName: Alabama PACE (Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly)

verified.notes: No specific age, income, or asset limits found in provided sources for Alabama PACE; general PACE targets frail elderly (typically 55+ per CMS). Mercy LIFE of Alabama is the active program. Cannot find authoritative financial eligibility data.

programs.programName: Alabama Medicaid Medicare Savings Programs (QMB, SLMB, QI)

verified.notes: Values for QMB effective February 2026 per official source; no asset limits or phone found in results

programs.notes: Values for QMB effective February 2026 per official source; no asset limits or phone found in results

verified.notes: Age requirement: Official DHR PDF (Oct 2025) specifies 65+; however, one iCarol source and Area Agency on Aging cite 60+. The most recent official state document (Oct 2025) indicates 65. Income limits: Search results reference income/resource limits but state they are 'the same as for any other food assistance household' without providing specific current 2026 figures. The FY23 fact sheet contains historical income limits but is not current for 2026. No current 2026 income or asset limits found in retrievable sources.

programs.programName: Alabama SHIP (State Health Insurance Assistance Program)

verified.notes: Alabama SHIP is the State Health Insurance Assistance Program for Medicare beneficiaries. Search results do not contain specific eligibility thresholds (age, income, or asset limits) for this program. The phone number 1-800-243-5463 is confirmed across multiple official sources including the SHIP TA Center and state agency websites. To obtain complete eligibility requirements, applicants should contact the program directly or visit the official Alabama Department of Senior Services website.

verified.notes: Program is officially Elderly Nutrition Program (ENP); Meals on Wheels is a common name for home-delivered component. No income or asset limits found in official sources; program is free with voluntary contributions. No statewide application phone number identified.

verified.notes: No eligibility criteria for age, income, or assets found in sources; program targets full-time unpaid family caregivers for loved ones of any age with chronic illness/disability. verified.notes: Program requires income below 125% of federal poverty level (not a fixed dollar amount); no resource/asset limit required per Alabama Department of Senior Services. Phone number is general AGE-LINE for East Alabama region; other regional coordinators available via https://www.cwiworks.org/for-job-seekers/our-programs/scsep/scsep-near-you/scsep-in-alabama/
